overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing the protagonist Basim walking through a historic Middle Eastern city during golden hour. The character moves from an open courtyard through a large decorative archway into a narrow passage, then emerges into a plaza with a central fountain surrounded by Islamic architecture and NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic courtyard with decorative archway entrance

events.description: character approaches and passes through the large pointed archway into a narrow passage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the sunlit courtyard toward the ornate archway, weapon visible on back

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown robes walking across the courtyard from left to right

entered.detail: tall pointed archway with intricate stone carvings and geometric patterns marking the passage entrance
sandstone building with blue decorative tile work and arched windows
building with dome and cypress trees in front, featuring ornate stone facades
tall palm tree rising above the courtyard casting long shadows
tall slender tower visible in the distance through the archway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit historic courtyard with warm golden hour lighting. The camera follows the hooded protagonist walking toward a large ornate archway. Islamic architecture with blue tile accents lines the courtyard, and a few NPCs wander in the background. The character approaches the archway which frames a distant minaret tower.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between high sandstone walls

events.description: entered the narrow covered passage through the archway, walls closing in on both sides
exiting the narrow passage into the open plaza with the fountain visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow corridor between high stone walls, approaching the open plaza

entered.detail: tall sandstone wall with decorative blue tile patterns and climbing vines
high stone wall with wooden beams and fabric awnings
ornate metal lantern suspended from chains above the path
large building with golden dome becoming visible through the passage exit

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow passage between high sandstone walls adorned with blue tiles and hanging lanterns. The space is more enclosed than the previous courtyard, with the camera moving steadily forward. At the end of the passage, an open plaza with a domed building and decorative fountain becomes visible as the character approaches the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with central fountain and domed monument

events.description: entered the main plaza area with NPCs gathered around the central fountain

agents.ego_description: walking around the fountain plaza, navigating between groups of standing NPCs while heading toward the domed building

notable_agents.action: group of three NPCs in robes standing and conversing near the fountain edge

entered.detail: octagonal fountain with blue mosaic tile work and water feature, surrounded by stone paving
dense bushes with vibrant blue flowers lining the plaza edge
multi-story building with wooden balconies and intricate stone carvings
stone seating area adjacent to the flower bushes

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a spacious sunlit plaza featuring a central decorative fountain with blue mosaic tiles. Several NPCs gather around the fountain conversing, while the camera navigates around them. To the right, vibrant blue flower bushes line the path, and ahead rises a large domed building. The ground transitions to patterned stone tiles, and the architecture features ornate wooden balconies and detailed stonework.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit historic courtyard through a confined passage and into a sprawling urban plaza. It begins by following the hooded protagonist across a golden-hour courtyard lined with blue-tiled Islamic architecture, moving steadily toward a large ornate archway that frames a distant minaret. As the character passes through the arch, the environment shifts into a narrow sandstone corridor enclosed by high walls and hanging lanterns, creating a sense of compression before the exit opens up. The scene then expands as the character emerges into a spacious plaza, where the ground transitions to patterned stone tiles surrounding a central mosaic fountain. Finally, the camera navigates past gathering NPCs and vibrant blue flower bushes toward a large domed building adorned with ornate wooden balconies.
